sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Crunchyroll accused of sharing users’ video viewing data without consent
feed.summary: Crunchyroll is facing a class action lawsuit for allegedly violating the Video Privacy Protection Act (VPPA) by sharing users' video viewing data with a third-party marketing company, Braze Inc., without obtaining explicit consent. Lead plaintiff Francisco Cabonios and others claim Crunchyroll embedded Braze's software to transmit personally identifiable information, including email addresses and video titles. The lawsuit seeks $2,500 in statutory damages per violation for users whose privacy was breached.

feed.title: [Form 4] Bumble Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Blackstone-affiliated entities, identified as 10% owners of Bumble Inc. (BMBL), have reported disposing of 7,477,504 shares of Class A common stock at $3.51 per share on March 17, 2026. These transactions were conducted through various holding vehicles via a post-paid forward agreement with an unaffiliated financial institution. Despite these sales, the reporting persons retain substantial indirect holdings in Bumble.

feed.title: BNY Mellon Core Bond ETF (BKAG) Dividend Yield 2026, Date & History
feed.summary: This article provides current and historical dividend information for the BNY Mellon Core Bond ETF (BKAG). It details the ETF's annual dividend of $1.76 per share, a dividend yield of 4.17%, and its monthly payment schedule. The content also includes a comprehensive dividend history table with future payment dates and changes, alongside comparisons to market averages.

feed.title: L3 Harris: A 7.1 Rating in the Competitive Defense Sector
feed.summary: Motley Fool analysts discuss L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) in a Scoreboard episode, providing insights into market trends and investment opportunities. The article highlights that while L3Harris wasn't chosen as one of their top 10 stocks, the "Stock Advisor" team has a strong track record of identifying high-growth companies. It also mentions a report on a "little-known company" providing critical AI technology.

feed.title: Biohaven (NASDAQ: BHVN) director reports gifting 34,684 shares, adds family trust
feed.summary: Biohaven Ltd. director Kishan Mehta reported bona fide gift transfers of 34,684 common shares on March 17, 2026. One transfer of 17,342 shares reduced his directly held stake to 5,320 common shares. The remaining 17,342 shares were transferred to the "Kishen Mehta 21 Family Irrevocable Trust," with Mehta disclaiming beneficial ownership of these securities.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Supercharging Its Lean AI Logistics Engine
feed.summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide has expanded its Lean AI operating system, leveraging over 100 trillion logistics data points to automate tasks and improve execution speed and reliability. This AI enhancement strengthens the company's non-asset-based logistics model against potential challenges from digital marketplaces. While it may provide efficiency and service differentiation, investors are still weighing the impact on margins amidst intensifying digital freight competition.

feed.title: Cboe Global Markets Stock: Good Hedge For High Volatility (BATS:CBOE)
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) has developed proprietary products that serve as crucial tools for investors during periods of high market uncertainty and volatility. The company is largely insulated from geopolitical events and supply chain disruptions due to its asset-light business model, which primarily generates revenue from licensing its franchise assets and trading activities. This positioning makes Cboe a strong candidate for hedging against market fluctuations.

feed.title: Omnicom Interpublic Deal Reshapes Agencies With Synergies And Job Cuts
feed.summary: Omnicom Group has finalized its $13 billion acquisition of Interpublic Group, leading to a significant restructuring plan that includes 4,000 job cuts and agency brand consolidations. The merged entity aims to achieve $1.5 billion in annual cost synergies, with $900 million targeted for 2026, positioning itself as a larger, more diversified marketing-services group. Investors are urged to monitor client retention, cost savings, and the execution risk associated with merging two global companies amidst broader market uncertainties.

feed.title: Actelis Networks Inc (ASNS) Stock Price, Quote, News & History
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of Actelis Networks Inc (ASNS) stock, including its current price, news, financial data, and analyst ratings. It highlights recent news about the stock's movements, such as a surge after a reported revenue rebound and an expanded share repurchase program, as well as a jump following a new order from a Japanese government entity for its MetaLight networking solutions. Key financial statistics and comparisons with competitors are also included.

feed.title: BofA Finance (BAC) prices callable notes with 11.25% contingent coupon
feed.summary: BofA Finance LLC, guaranteed by Bank of America Corporation (BAC), has priced 9-month callable yield notes with a contingent coupon of 11.25% per annum. The notes are linked to the S&P 500®, iShares MSCI ACWI ETF, and iShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF, and are callable monthly starting April 23, 2026. Holders face leveraged downside risk if the least performing underlying falls below 80% of its starting value, potentially losing up to 100% of principal.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Paul Oldham Sells Shares of Advanced Energy Indust
feed.summary: Advanced Energy Industries Inc's (AEIS) Executive Vice President and CFO, Paul Oldham, sold 4,314 shares of the company on March 18, 2026. Following this transaction, Oldham now owns 22,217 shares. The stock is currently trading at $315.99, making its price-to-GF-Value ratio 2.54, indicating it is significantly overvalued according to GuruFocus.

feed.title: Abbott Acquisition Of Exact Sciences Refocuses Growth On Cancer Diagnostics
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories has announced its acquisition of Exact Sciences, a strategic move to significantly expand its presence and growth in cancer diagnostics. This acquisition aims to strengthen Abbott's diagnostics portfolio by integrating Exact Sciences' cancer testing capabilities, aligning with Abbott's focus on large chronic-disease markets like cancer, diabetes, and cardiovascular care. The success of this deal will depend on integration, but it positions Abbott for future growth in the advanced diagnostics sector, albeit with potential challenges related to competition and integration costs.

feed.title: ZVOL ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns CBOE:ZVOL
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of the Volatility Premium Plus ETF (ZVOL), detailing its key statistics, investment strategy, and performance. ZVOL aims to offer a monthly income stream and inverse exposure to mid-term VIX futures, primarily as a short-term trading tool rather than a long-term investment. The ETF is structured as a commodity pool, avoids issuing K-1 forms, and pays monthly dividends, with its shares issued by Volatility Shares LLC.

feed.title: Alvotech (ALVO) TTM Profitability Challenged By Q4 US$108.5 Million Net Loss
feed.summary: Alvotech (ALVO) reported a Q4 net loss of US$108.5 million but maintained trailing twelve-month profitability at US$27.9 million. The article discusses the tension between recent quarterly losses and full-year profit, highlighting investor focus on margin sustainability and earnings stability. Valuation metrics appear attractive, yet balance sheet concerns and reliance on fluctuating revenue streams pose risks, prompting caution for investors.

feed.title: Alignment Healthcare (ALHC) CEO sells shares to cover RSU tax withholding
feed.summary: Alignment Healthcare CEO John E. Kao sold 73,046 shares of common stock at a weighted-average price of $17.84 per share. This sale was explicitly stated to cover tax withholding obligations associated with the vesting of restricted stock units (RSUs) and was not a discretionary trade. Following this transaction, Kao retains significant direct and indirect holdings in the company.

feed.title: Citigroup Inc. Trade Ideas — LSX:A1H92V
feed.summary: This article compiles various trade ideas for Citigroup Inc. (LSX:A1H92V) from different traders on TradingView. The ideas include both long and short positions, technical analysis based on patterns like bullish bats, double bottoms, Fibonacci retracements, and wave theories, as well as fundamental outlooks regarding earnings and support/resistance levels. General sentiment ranges from bullish predictions aiming for $70-$78 to bearish outlooks noting sector weakness and potential pullbacks.

feed.title: Jif releases 'simple' peanut butter spread made with just 3 ingredients
feed.summary: Jif has launched a new "Simply Creamy Unsweetened" peanut butter, featuring just three ingredients: peanuts, salt, and palm oil. This move aims to cater to consumers seeking cleaner labels while maintaining the brand's signature smooth texture and nutty taste. The product is currently available at Walmart and will soon be rolled out to other national retailers.

feed.title: A Look At MarketAxess Holdings (MKTX) Valuation Following Recent Share Price Softness
feed.summary: MarketAxess Holdings (MKTX) operates an electronic bond trading platform with annual revenue of US$846.3m and net income of US$246.6m. Despite recent share price softness, with returns of 3.76% over 7 days and 1.74% over 1 month, its 1-year total shareholder return is 18.5% and 5-year is 62.82%. The company is considered undervalued by one narrative, trading at an estimated 17% discount to its intrinsic value and below some analyst targets, with growth driven by expansion into emerging markets and Eurobonds.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reconsider Avantor (AVTR) After A 53% One Year Share Price Decline
feed.summary: Avantor (AVTR) has seen a significant 53% decline in its share price over the past year, prompting a reevaluation of its intrinsic value. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 50.9% at $7.61, indicating a fair value of around $15.50 per share. Additionally, its Price/Sales ratio of 0.79x is considerably lower than the industry average, further suggesting it may be undervalued.

feed.title: Phillies 2026: New food options coming to Citizens Bank Park this season
feed.summary: Citizens Bank Park is introducing several new food and drink options for the 2026 Phillies season, including Sánchez Sliders, the Schwarbomb Sundae, and The Sweeper, with portions of proceeds benefiting various charities. New vendors like Freddy's Frozen Custard and LaScala's Fire are also featured, alongside enhanced versions of fan favorites like the 1883 Burger Co Smash Burger and the return of the 9-9-9 Challenge. These additions aim to enhance the fan experience as the Phillies prepare for their home opener against the Texas Rangers.

feed.title: Array Technologies (NASDAQ: ARRY) CEO nets shares from RSU vesting
feed.summary: Array Technologies' CEO, Kevin G. Hostetler, reported the vesting of 160,217 restricted stock units (RSUs) into common stock on March 17 and 18, 2026. The company withheld 67,052 shares to cover tax obligations, and Hostetler now directly holds 324,266 common shares. Additionally, he retains 632,287 unvested RSUs from prior grants.

feed.title: Primega Group Holdings Limited (PGHL) Stock Forecast & Price Prediction 2026–2030

It indicates a neutral current sentiment with some bullish technical indicators and forecasts PGHL to reach $0.9312 by the end of 2026 and $1.99 by the end of 2030, representing significant gains from its current price of $0.8100. The article also includes disclaimers that the information is not investment advice.

feed.title: Arcellx (ACLX) CFO gifts 5,000 shares to family foundation

This move, coupled with the company's continuous advancements in AI chip technology and bullish analyst sentiment, is expected to further boost its growth. The article suggests several ETFs with significant NVIDIA allocation for investors looking to capitalize on this opportune moment.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) After Recent Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: This article analyzes Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) stock after recent share price weakness, suggesting it may be overvalued. Using an Excess Returns model, Simply Wall St estimates an intrinsic value of $132.86 per share against a current price of US$158.50, indicating it's 19.3% overvalued. Similarly, its current P/E of 27.15x is significantly higher than Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 16.49x, reinforcing the overvalued assessment for the financial infrastructure company.

feed.title: Akso Health Group (AHG) Valuation Check As Shares Hit A New 52 Week High On Strong Revenue Growth
feed.summary: Akso Health Group (AHG) recently reached a new 52-week high of US$2.10, showing significant revenue growth of 75.6% and a 30% total return over the past year. Despite these gains, the company trades at a high price-to-book ratio of 10.5x, which is considered expensive given its thin 1% gross margin and substantial loss of US$135.67m against US$14.84m in revenue. This valuation suggests the stock may be overvalued relative to the broader US Healthcare industry and its peers.

feed.title: CoStar CEO Andy Florance named Business Journal Real Estate Icon
feed.summary: Andy Florance, CEO of CoStar Group Inc., has been recognized as a Business Journal Real Estate Icon by the Washington Business Journal. Florance founded CoStar in 1986 while still in college, later expanding its portfolio with major platforms like Apartments.com and Homes.com. The article briefly highlights his entrepreneurial journey and the significant growth of his real estate technology company.

feed.title: QuickBooks Desktop Deadline Tests Intuit Retention As Xero Targets Migrations
feed.summary: Intuit faces a retention challenge as its QuickBooks Desktop 2023 support ends on May 31, 2026, forcing small businesses to migrate. Competitors like Xero and Xendoo are actively targeting these migrating users with a dedicated platform, Q2X, increasing churn risk for Intuit. The transition tests Intuit's ability to move its customer base to its cloud-based offerings, while also presenting an opportunity for more consistent, subscription-based revenue.

feed.title: Martin Franklin Sells 3,000,000 Shares of APi Group (NYSE:APG) Stock
feed.summary: Martin Franklin, a director at APi Group, sold 3,000,000 shares of the company's stock for approximately $122.64 million, reducing his stake by 12.38%. This transaction follows APi Group's strong Q4 earnings, which surpassed expectations with Q4 EPS of $0.44 and revenue of $2.12 billion, leading to positive analyst sentiment and raised price targets. Institutional investors hold a significant 86.62% of the company's stock, which currently has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts.

feed.title: Assessing Hartford (HIG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Undervaluation Debate

Despite this short-term weakness, the stock is seen by many analysts as 12.9% undervalued, with a narrative fair value of $150.85 against its current trading price of $131.36. Investors are urged to consider potential risks like elevated catastrophe losses and softer property and casualty pricing.

feed.title: 3 Best Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy in March
feed.summary: This article recommends three "Dividend Kings" – Coca-Cola, Procter & Gamble, and Federal Realty – as solid dividend growth stocks for investors to consider in March, especially during uncertain market conditions. These companies are highlighted for their reliable products, strong brand loyalty, and consistent dividend increases spanning over 50 years. Federal Realty, as the only REIT Dividend King, is noted for its high yield and quality retail properties.

feed.title: VisionWave Holdings acquires VisionWave Israel, appoints new CEO and signs consulting deal
feed.summary: VisionWave Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:VWAV) has acquired 100% of VisionWave IL Ltd. for nominal consideration, despite VWAV shares trading down 33% over the past six months and being deemed overvalued by InvestingPro. Following the acquisition, VisionWave IL Ltd. appointed Khdoura Sabbagh as CEO with an annual salary of $150,000 and eligibility for 2,000,000 stock options, and also entered into a consulting agreement with CO-Finance Financial and Accounting Consulting Ltd. for financial services. This move is part of VisionWave's broader strategic developments, including recent acquisitions and increased stakes in other Israeli companies.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Steel Dynamics (STLD) After Recent Tariff Headlines And Price Pullback

The article encourages investors to consider different narrative approaches to valuation, factoring in ongoing market developments and company specifics.

feed.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Increases Despite Market Slip: Here's What You Need to Know
feed.summary: Quanta Services (PWR) saw its stock increase by 1.04% in a recent trading session, outperforming the S&P 500, Dow, and Nasdaq, which all experienced losses. Over the last month, PWR shares have risen by 10.15%, significantly exceeding the Construction sector's decline. Analysts predict robust growth for the company's upcoming earnings, with an estimated EPS increase of 20.22% and revenue growth of 14.08% compared to the previous year.

feed.title: Atopic Dermatitis Pipeline 2026: FDA Approvals and Clinical Trials Landscape with MOA and ROA Highlights by DelveInsight | GlaxoSmithKline PLC, Nestle SA, Pfizer Inc., Regeneron Pharma, Abbvie
feed.summary: DelveInsight's report highlights a robust pipeline for Atopic Dermatitis, with over 100 companies developing more than 120 therapies. Recent FDA approvals and ongoing clinical trials signal significant advancements, including new topical and injectable options, and promising oral small molecules. Key companies like Pfizer, Kymera Therapeutics, and AstraZeneca are actively involved in developing innovative treatments to address the unmet needs in the Atopic Dermatitis market.

feed.title: Is Jack Henry And Associates (JKHY) Fairly Priced After Recent Share Price Weakness?

However, when evaluated using its P/E ratio of 23.4x against a proprietary Fair Ratio of 13.5x, the stock appears overvalued.

feed.title: Exclusive Travel Deals for Canadians: Unbeatable Offers from Travelzoo
feed.summary: Travelzoo has released new exclusive vacation packages for its Canadian members, featuring discounted trips to destinations like Aruba, Cape Breton, and Tofino. These curated deals offer premium travel experiences at reduced prices, appealing to those seeking tropical getaways or scenic Canadian escapes. Membership provides access to these limited-time offers, including flights, accommodations, and tax-inclusive packages, alongside personalized recommendations.

feed.title: Silver Lake adjusts Dell (NYSE: DELL) position, still holds 50.2M shares
feed.summary: Silver Lake-affiliated funds have filed an amendment to their Schedule 13D, disclosing an updated beneficial ownership of 50,240,830 Dell Technologies' Class C shares, representing about 7.8% of total outstanding common stock and 14.0% of the combined voting power as of March 18, 2026. Over the past 60 days, Silver Lake entities sold approximately 1.35 million Class C shares and made non-cash distributions of another 496,202 Class C shares to equity holders, obtained through the conversion of Class B shares. This activity is viewed as a repositioning and distribution of an existing large stake rather than a new strategic move, with Dell's multi-class voting structure retaining 10 votes per Class A and B share, and one vote per Class C share.

feed.title: Certain Pre-Funded Warrants of Vision Marine Technologies Inc. are subject to a Lock-Up Agreement Ending on 20-MAR-2026.
feed.summary: Vision Marine Technologies Inc. announced that certain pre-funded warrants are subject to a lock-up agreement ending on March 20, 2026. These warrants will be locked up for 91 days, starting from December 19, 2025. Executive officers and directors have agreed not to transfer common shares or convertible securities for this period without prior written consent.

feed.title: Linking wells to facilities: How digital tools are reshaping oil and gas production
feed.summary: Digital tools are transforming the oil and gas industry by connecting wells, facilities, and pipelines to improve operational efficiency and decision-making. Solutions like SLB's OptiFlow, OptiSite, and the Tela AI assistant integrate data and workflows across the entire production system, providing earlier insights and enabling more coordinated management. This shift allows operators to move from monitoring individual assets to managing entire systems holistically, leading to more informed decisions and optimized production.
